title: The Road to Sabaody: Turning Point
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Duval, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #12, Franky, Unknown person #15 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Duval, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #12, Franky, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since mermaids fetch an especially high price,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They're a bunch of kidnapping thugs...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one knows what he looks like,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But it seems he's searching for someone.

dialogue.speaker: Duval
dialogue.text: We'll save the takoyaki, for sure!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: You mean the shop's owner, I hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Flying fish!? They can fly that high!?

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Duval, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #12, Franky, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: turning point.
